Community Signals

Uncover hidden market opportunities by analyzing real community pain points and solution gaps

July 9, 2025

Updates & Announcements

📢

New Feature Release - Idea Builder

Turn your idea research into ready-to-use AI prompts. Instead of starting with a blank prompt, you get one that already includes your market insights, audience data, and business context. Works with Bolt.new, Claude, ChatGPT, and other AI tools. Just copy the prompt and start building.

Trends Added

calculate operating profit, sharpening services

[+2 more]

June 23, 2025

Updates & Announcements

📢

Database filters

New! You can now filter ideas by market size, pain level, timing, build difficulty, type, and more—making it way easier to find the right opportunities fast.

[+3 more]

June 7, 2025

Updates & Announcements

✨

Hover Tooltips on Tags

You can now hover over any tag (like Unfair Advantage, Trend-Backed, or Pain-Driven) to instantly see what it means and why it matters. This makes it easier to understand the value of each idea at a glance — no guessing, no jargon. Just quick, clear insight so you can focus on finding your next winning startup.

✨

Idea Downloads/Exports for Pro Member

Idea downloads are now available for pro members. Export all the raw research data and information for an idea into a json file. From there you can easily upload it into your favorite LLM for further brainstorming and analysis.

June 5, 2025

Updates & Announcements

✨

Better trends search

Previously trends search was pretty limited. Now when you search it will consider both the keyword and the trend description and provides much better results.

📢

100+ New Trends Added

Lots of new trends added today

June 4, 2025

Updates & Announcements

✨

Frequently Asked Questions

We've added a frequently asked questions to address the common questions that have been coming in.

✨

Better Database Search

Previously search was pretty limited. It was based just on title. Now, search is much more robust and will search through idea summaries to provide more accurate results.

📢

More Browsing for Free Members

Previously free members could only view the first page of the idea database and not perform any searching. While viewing the ideas in depth requires starter plan or higher, free members can now get a better preview of what the database offers to decide if they'd like to upgrade.

June 3, 2025

Updates & Announcements

📢

Trial Waitlist

We've had a number of emails asking if we offer a trial. So, we created a waitlist to be notified when we drop the next trial offer.
